app.name: SwasthyaPath
app.subtitle: Get preliminary, non-diagnostic health guidance in minutes

landing.description: Describe your symptoms and receive guided health advice. Our AI-assisted triage system helps you understand when to rest at home, visit a clinic, or seek urgent care.
landing.step1: Describe your symptoms in your own words
landing.step2: Answer a few guided follow-up questions
landing.step3: Receive personalized guidance and next steps
landing.notADoctor: This is NOT a medical diagnosis tool

symptom.welcome: Hello! I'm your health guidance assistant. Please describe what you're feeling.
symptom.placeholder: e.g., I have had a fever and cough for 2 days...

result.title: Your Assessment Result
result.greenDesc: Your symptoms appear manageable at home
result.yellowDesc: We recommend speaking with a healthcare provider
result.NON_URGENT_CONSULT: Book a teleconsult or visit your doctor within 24-48 hours
result.URGENT_CARE: Visit the nearest emergency room or call 112 immediately

common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
common.disclaimer: ⚠️ This tool does NOT provide medical diagnosis. It offers preliminary guidance only. Always consult a qualified healthcare professional. In emergencies, call 112.
